fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$9.8K – US$24K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: West Jakarta campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Technology labs.
